description: Thin Zellij CLI helpers shared across CLI modules (zellij.py:1)

key_interfaces.name: _run
key_interfaces.description: Run a zellij action command with optional session flag

key_interfaces.name: _run_global
key_interfaces.description: Run a top-level zellij command (not action)

key_interfaces.name: ensure_session
key_interfaces.description: Create or verify session exists; handles EXITED sessions by deleting and recreating

key_interfaces.name: session_exists
key_interfaces.description: Check if a Zellij session exists (strips ANSI escape codes)

key_interfaces.name: new_tab
key_interfaces.description: Create a new tab with optional command and cwd

key_interfaces.name: close_tab
key_interfaces.description: Close tab by finding tab_id from list-panes then closing

key_interfaces.name: send_command
key_interfaces.description: Send text to pane using write-chars + send-keys Enter

key_interfaces.name: dump_screen
key_interfaces.description: Dump pane screen content as text

key_interfaces.name: tab_exists
key_interfaces.description: Check if tab exists via list-panes matching tab_name

key_interfaces.name: get_pane_id
key_interfaces.description: Get terminal pane ID for a tab in 'terminal_N' format

key_interfaces.name: go_to_tab
key_interfaces.description: Switch to a tab by name

key_interfaces.name: subscribe_pane
key_interfaces.description: Start subscribe process for streaming pane reads, returns Popen

user_flows.name: ensure session lifecycle
steps: if exists + EXITED, delete-session then recreate
if exists + not EXITED, return session name
if not exists, create with optional layout + config via --new-session-with-layout or attach --create-background
